title: Home thread: description-input dialog + auto-title UI (web-ui)
prompt:
GOAL: Update the web-ui so creating a home (sidebar) chat thread asks for a DESCRIPTION instead of a name, and the thread shows an AUTO-SUMMARIZED title that updates as the conversation evolves. Manual rename stays available as an override. Depends on the backend/contract task (description input + auto/pending title state).

CONTEXT (read first):
- web-ui/src/components/home-agent/home-thread-create-dialog.tsx — currently a 'name' text input (placeholder 'e.g. Debugging') + agent picker.
- web-ui/src/hooks/use-home-threads.ts — createThread({ name, agentId }), DEFAULT_THREAD_NAME = 'Default', buildDefaultThread; calls runtime.createHomeThread.mutate.
- web-ui/src/components/home-agent/home-thread-bar.tsx (thread switcher / title rendering), home-thread-rename-dialog.tsx (keep manual rename).
- Follow AGENTS.md web-ui stack/styling rules (Tailwind v4, Radix, lucide, surface tokens, src/components/ui primitives). Subscribe high-frequency slices in leaf components (memory: perf10 runtime store selectors).

REQUIRED BEHAVIOR:
1. Create dialog: replace the single-line 'name' input with a multi-line DESCRIPTION textarea (this becomes the thread's kickoff prompt). Keep the agent picker. Submit sends the description to the new createHomeThread contract; no manual title needed. Placeholder like 'Describe what you want to work on…'.
2. Thread bar / switcher: render the auto-generated title. While the title is still being summarized, show the provisional/placeholder state (e.g. 'Summarizing…' or the truncated description) gracefully, and update live when the backend broadcasts the new title.
3. Keep the manual rename dialog working; renaming pins the title (per backend titleAuto flag).
4. Default thread keeps its existing 'Default' label and remains non-renamable/closable.

ACCEPTANCE:
- Adding a session = typing a description; a summarized title appears shortly after and refreshes as the chat continues.
- Manual rename still works and stops auto-updates.
- web:typecheck + biome clean. No any types.
